productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex High Can Red Black Shoe
description: These stylish red mid-cut canvas shoes from adidas make a trendy and youthful fashion statement. These lifestyle shoes are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperHeavy cotton canvas uppers in red with slightly cushioned inners for snug Fit and protectionRed lace-ups and synthetic black leather velcro strap around ankle for perfect fitMidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber toe guard for added protectionDurable gum rubber outsole with multi-directional gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
